episodes.title: My Ego Help Me To Escape a Soft Cult
episodes.description:
In this video, I explain how my ego helped me escape a place that felt really good at first.

It gave me belonging, purpose, and safety at one of the lowest points of my life. I was scared to leave, because part of me believed I needed it.

But underneath that warmth, I slowly realized it had become exploitation.

Ego is not always arrogant or hungry for attention. Sometimes ego hides inside the identities we build to feel safe. And sometimes, it becomes the protector that helps us finally leave.
